About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 2010, Ajooni Biotech Ltd is a
vegetarian based animal health care solutions company.
[1]
Key Points
Business Overview:
[1]
ABL is an animal health care solutions company which helps in improving the productivity of Dairy farmers and sustainably increase livestock yields. It deals in the Compounded Animal Feed and feed supplements in India and its portfolio offers a wide range of Quality Cattle feed, Cattle feed Chips, Camel Feed, Cotton Oil Cake, Mustard Oil Cake and a wide range of Feed supplements to cover the entire life-cycle of an animal.
